data.body: src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts:295-316 terminateProcessGroup SIGTERMs a process group (and SIGKILLs after 5s) with ZERO logging. Every caller — watchdog timeout, external abort, connection manager — leaves no trace of what killed the child. Must emit a single console.warn at function entry with pid, a caller-provided reason string (new optional second argument), and the delayMs. Callers that already log their reason (watchdog fire log) can still pass a brief reason tag.
data.title: Log terminateProcessGroup at entry
